descriptionList.text: The virus that causes chickenpox also causes shingles. The varicella zoster virus remains in your body in a dormant state. As you get older, it could reactivate again, leading to infections like shingles.

Secondly, The virus that causes chickenpox also causes shingles. The varicella zoster virus remains in your body in a dormant state. As you get older, it could reactivate again, leading to infections like shingles.

Thirdly, The virus that causes chickenpox also causes shingles. The varicella zoster virus remains in your body in a dormant state. As you get older, it could reactivate again, leading to infections like shingles.
